summary.description: One-line description of the code changes made for the upgrade.

changes_made.description: For the human reviewing the PR. Each item is either an edit made to their code (file, what, why — e.g. 'dags/etl.py: airflow.operators.python -> airflow.providers.standard.operators.python') or a decision about their code (a usage reviewed and deliberately left unchanged, an edit reverted — with the reason). Never narrate process: no 'loaded guidance', 'ran scanner/greps', no lists of patterns or tools checked. If nothing else needed migration, say so in one line.

manual_followups.description: Changes a human must finish — anything ambiguous or risky left unedited.

files_changed.description: Repository paths edited during the migration.
